---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
---

## About Me

Welcome! I'm a data scientist passionate about turning data into actionable insights.

## About This Blog

This blog covers topics in data science, machine learning, statistical analysis, and more. Posts are available in both English and Korean.
